text:
Fix: Pari/GP is a mathematics library and the calculator program package
which are high ability.

This varsion is alpha quarity and action of gp includes a few problems,
but there is the time that performance improves by improvement of 
algorithm greatly.

In particular because there was a demand to want to utilize this
version, therefore I made it with identifier of "pari-devel" newly.
